rows.notes: Clear page header with year designation. No monetary amounts expected.
Section heading clearly underlined. Structural label introducing assets section. No amounts.
Clear handwriting. Amounts well-aligned with vertical ruling lines. £57 16s 4d. All values within valid range.
Amount shown as £236 16s 10d with a secondary marking 'L9932 4' noted to the right. Main amount is clear; right-side notation appears to be a reference or cross-check. All currency values valid.
Sub-section label within Assets. Handwriting clear but structure suggests this introduces grouped items below. No monetary amount on this line.
Amount shown as £3000 with no shillings or pence recorded. Large round number is consistent with furniture valuation. Only pounds column populated.
Amount £6071 14s 2d clearly aligned. A secondary notation '9271 1/4 2' appears to right, likely cross-reference. Main amount passes all validation checks.
Clear section heading with colon. Underlined. Introduces liability/debt section. No amounts.
Amount shows £134 with no shillings or pence. Column alignment suggests only pounds column is populated. Handwriting slightly loose but readable.
Amount £224 15s 3d. Clear alignment with column lines. All values valid. Possibly 'Leither' is a place name or account holder.

Handwriting becomes looser and script harder to parse. Amount £53 13s 4d is well-aligned. Currency values all valid. Description text is somewhat ambiguous — could be 'Houses on Long Lanes' or similar property reference.
Amount £1 18s with no pence recorded. Clear handwriting. Shillings value is at upper limit (18) but valid (max 19). Positioned in the series of College liabilities.

Amount shows £70 with no shillings/pence. Text at far left is partially obscured; appears to read 'Junior Common Room' but handwriting is condensed. Amount well-aligned. The marker 'II.99' appears to left of amount.
Line placed after Junior Common Room entry with horizontal rule above. Amount £484 3s 7d appears to be sum of College liabilities. Clear alignment. All values valid.
Amount £181 10s 11d. Clear handwriting. The marker 'I.147' visible to left. Name in parentheses may indicate fund beneficiary or account holder. All currency values valid.
Amount £16 14s with no pence. Marker 'I.152' at left. Line appears to be sub-item or related entry to row 15. Handwriting looser. Description text is faded/unclear.
Amount £19 12s 7d. Clear text and well-aligned amounts. Marker 'I.166' at left. All values pass validation. Named fund, likely endowment or restricted account.
Line with horizontal rule above. Amount £54 17s 6d. Well-positioned and clearly aligned with column lines. Appears to be sum of endowment entries (rows 15–17). All values valid.

rows.description: Certify that the Accounts of the College are duly kept in proper books of account; that the Balances and Balance Sheet contain a full & true account of the financial condition of the College.
rows.notes: Large block of certification text spanning multiple lines. This is a formal attestation statement, not a ledger entry. No monetary amounts. Clear handwriting.
Date of certification. Clear handwriting. No monetary amount associated.
Signatory name and credentials. Clear handwriting. No monetary amount. Right-aligned as typical for signature blocks.

Additional signature or secondary attestation. Handwriting is quite faded and cursive; very difficult to parse with confidence. Appears to reference auditors or additional certifiers. No monetary amount.

Amount £1602 15s 7d appears at bottom right, preceded by a long horizontal rule spanning the columns. This is the final balance sheet total or reconciliation amount. Clear alignment and values all valid. May be underlined or marked to emphasize finality.
